category_sources: source_facts.description identifies htop as an improved top interactive process viewer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives htop; current_curation.display-name also gives htop.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official htop site; source_facts.repo points to the official GitHub project whose README documents use and development.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states interactive process viewer; current_curation.tags includes cli.
